name: -hf
oneliner: Weights converted to HuggingFace transformers format (safetensors + config.json). Does NOT mean 'hosted on HF'. Without -hf may need custom loading.
explanation: Critical for usability. Llama-2-7b-hf (converted) vs Llama-2-7b (original Megatron format). Modern releases (Llama 3+) are HF-native, making suffix less necessary.
